name: job-hunter-upwork-search
notes:
FR11: this flow MUST NOT log into Upwork. Public RSS / public listing pages only. Stories 7.1–7.4 share the n8n contract; see `docs/n8n-contract.md`.

FR11 reinforced from Story 7.1: this flow MUST NOT log into Upwork, LinkedIn, or OnlineJobs.ph. LinkedIn ingest is email-parse only (Story 7.4). This flow targets Upwork's public RSS endpoint only — no session cookie, no OAuth token, no browser-automation node.

Required env vars: INGEST_BASE_URL, INGEST_SHARED_TOKEN, UPWORK_SEARCH_QUERY. Hosting-agnostic: uses only Cron + HTTP Request + Function + IF nodes — no Execute Command, no Puppeteer / Selenium / headless Chromium, no filesystem-only node. Dedup state lives in n8n workflow static data under key `upwork.seen_urls` and survives n8n restarts.
